rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.405, which governs duty-free lunch periods for classroom teachers and librarians.
quote: each classroom teacher or full-time librarian is entitled to at least a 30-minute lunch period free from all duties and responsibilities connected with the instruction and supervision of students
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns teacher duty-free lunch, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
